name: I have pre-existing back pain and hurt it worse at work in Sandy Utah, will insurance pay?
description: Yes, covers work-related aggravation; prove with medical records.[1]

mainEntity.name: I have pre-existing back pain and hurt it worse at work in Sandy Utah, will insurance pay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers work-related aggravation; prove with medical records.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah workers' comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions if work caused worsening, paying for that portion of disability. Medical evidence must show job accident substantially contributed.[1] Key factors: doctor opinion on causation, records pre/post-injury, no proof needed of total injury cause. Get independent medical exam if disputed, track all treatments; attorney negotiates fair apportionment. Aggravation claims succeed with strong documentation.
